title: CLARKE CENTRE D'IMAGERIE MEDICALE INC. ransomware incident

extortion.description: CLARKE CENTRE D'IMAGERIE MEDICALE INC.Our mission is to provide top of the line, expert medical imaging services with rapid and timely transmission of results to the requesting physician. We make caring and personalized approach to every patient our priority. We are committed to provide an efficient and rapid service as well as a more comfortable, relaxed and pleasant atmosphere as opposed to often overcrowded and stressful hospital setting.https://clarkeradiology.com
